image_assets_legacy_source_asset_id_uidx.name: image_assets_legacy_source_asset_id_uidx
image_assets_legacy_source_asset_id_uidx.where: "image_assets"."legacy_source" is not null and "image_assets"."legacy_asset_id" is not null

customer_access_inquiries_owner_shape_ch.name: customer_access_inquiries_owner_shape_check
customer_access_inquiries_owner_shape_ch.value:
(
        ("customer_access_inquiries"."inquiry_type" = 'USER_ACCESS' and "customer_access_inquiries"."user_id" is not null)
        or ("customer_access_inquiries"."inquiry_type" = 'CONTRIBUTOR_APPLICATION' and "customer_access_inquiries"."contributor_id" is not null)
      )
